basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Office Raigarh (CMHO Raigarh) Dresser Grade-01, Rural Health Coordinator (Male), Pharmacist Grade-02 Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of CMHO Raigarh.Have been announced through the CMHO Raigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMHO Raigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CMHO Raigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026 is 28 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the posts in CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19500 to Rs. 80500 per month, depending on the specific post. For Dresser Grade-01, it's Rs. 19500-62000; for Rural Health Coordinator (Male), it's Rs. 22400-71200; and for Pharmacist Grade-02, it's Rs. 25300-80500.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I find the official notification for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q6. What are the important dates for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Key dates include Order Dates on 18 May 2026 and 8 May 2026, and the Last Date to Apply is 28 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before the final deadline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for CMHO Raigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment for these posts is on a contractual basis. This means the selected candidates will be appointed for a specific period as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The specific qualification details for each post are not provided in the summary. Candidates are strongly advised to refer to the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria and required educational qualifications for each position.

faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates should consult the official notification for comprehensive information regarding the selection methodology, which may include interviews or other assessment methods.
